ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity (e.g., Oil, Gold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "commodity_type" TEXT /* Type of commodity (e.g., energy, metal) */,
  "commodity_category" TEXT /* Category of commodity (e.g., precious, industrial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commodity was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the commodity details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity related to this price record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month and year of the price record */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the month */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price recorded in the month */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price recorded in the month */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Percentage change from the previous month */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the month */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the month */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded in the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_prices_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity for which the historical price is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price on that date */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price recorded on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price recorded on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume traded on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_month" TEXT /* Forecast month and year */,
  "predicted_average_price" REAL /* Predicted average price for the month */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the price prediction */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for making the forecast (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_forecasts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "price_at_trigger" REAL /* Price of the commodity at the time of triggering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
